subcodes.first_line: The Lord of nations hath proclaimed in the Most Great Prison: Verily, there is none other God but He, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق مولی الامم فی السجن الاعظم انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم فیکل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
